title: Powerlifting Program
description: Specialized training program for mastering the big three lifts: squat, bench press, and deadlift with a focus on peak performance.
overview: This powerlifting program uses periodization and progressive overload to maximize your squat, bench, and deadlift. Designed for intermediate to advanced lifters aiming to compete or simply maximize their big three lifts. Expected gains: 5-10% total increase every 6-8 weeks.

weekly_schedule.exercises: Competition Squats (5x3, 3x2, 1x1) + Box Squats (3x3) + Leg Press (3x5) + Hack Squats (3x5) + Core (2x8)
Bench Press (8x2 @ 60%) + Board Press (3x4) + Speed Rows (5x4 @ 50%) + Incline Bench (3x5) + Tricep Work
Competition Bench (5x3, 3x2, 1x1) + Close Grip Bench (3x4) + Dumbbell Bench (3x5) + Rows (3x5) + Tricep Dips
Deadlifts (5x2 @ 60%) + Speed Box Squats (5x2 @ 60%) + Rack Pulls (3x4) + Leg Curls (3x6) + Back Work
Focus on weak points. Example: Pin Squats, Board Presses, Pin Deadlifts, Safety Bar Work, Machine Movements

nutrition.content: 5 whole eggs + 3 slices whole wheat toast + 1 banana + 1 tbsp peanut butter
60g whey protein + 60g oats + 1 banana + 240ml whole milk
300g beef + 300g white rice + vegetables + 2 tbsp olive oil
60g whey protein + 100g simple carbs (white rice / dates)
350g chicken / steak + 300g sweet potato + large vegetable serving

tips: Use proper form over ego - bad form = bad lifts and injuries
Invest in quality gear: belt, wraps, good shoes, knee sleeves
Deload week every 4 weeks at 60% intensity
Video ALL heavy sets for form analysis
Track every single lift - use a notebook or app
Use proper breathing technique: inhale at setup, brace, exhale on concentric
Work with a coach or experienced lifter for form critique
Prioritize sleep: 8-10 hours for CNS recovery
Manage wrist/elbow/shoulder health with prehab work
Take 5+ minutes rest between heavy compound sets
Consider periodizing your training (hypertrophy → strength → peaking)
Use RPE-based training: stop 1-2 reps short of failure on most sets
Compete or test your maxes every 8-12 weeks
Supplement: whey protein, creatine, multivitamin, omega-3s
Join a powerlifting community or find a gym with serious lifters
